exploration_notes:
Module resolution in TypeScript is primarily implemented in **src/compiler/moduleNameResolver.ts** (~3400+ lines), with supporting types in types.ts, pattern matching utilities in utilities.ts and core.ts, and call-site orchestration in program.ts and resolutionCache.ts.

**Entry point & strategy dispatch**: `resolveModuleName` (line 1401) is the main entry. It reads `ModuleResolutionKind` from compiler options and dispatches via a switch (lines 1434-1452) to: `node16ModuleNameResolver` (Node16)
